destinations.evidence: The default deadline is 300ms, parse failures fall back to that constant, and valid environment values override it.

equivalence_argument: The port exactly implements the 300ms unset/invalid default with valid RETH_BUILD_DEADLINE_MS override semantics.
notes: Local tests in the same file assert default, override, and invalid-env behavior.
rationale: The primary commit changes DEFAULT_BUILD_DEADLINE_MS and the tests from 500ms to 300ms, with commit text saying unset or invalid default-budget behavior should be consistent. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: EthereumBuilderConfig::new uses a 300 millisecond build_deadline when RETH_BUILD_DEADLINE_MS is unset or cannot be parsed as milliseconds, while valid environment values still override the default.
suggested_falsification_tests: Clear RETH_BUILD_DEADLINE_MS and assert EthereumBuilderConfig::new().build_deadline is 300ms; set it to not_a_number and assert 300ms; set it to a valid value such as 750 and assert 750ms.
summary: EthereumBuilderConfig defaults payload build deadline to 300ms.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Clear RETH_BUILD_DEADLINE_MS, set it invalid, and set it to 750; assert build_deadline is 300ms, 300ms, and 750ms respectively.
title: Default payload build deadline is 300ms
